title: Test New Salesforce Consumer Secret and Key for Partner Dev Account
description: Test and integrate new Salesforce consumer key and secret from the new Partner Dev Account Connected App. Involved updating the application configuration with new credentials and verifying the Salesforce OAuth flow still worked.
acceptance_criteria: Application authenticates successfully with new Salesforce consumer key/secret
OAuth flow works end-to-end with new credentials
middleware_changes: Updated Salesforce consumer key and secret in application configuration.
implementation_notes: Initial key swap caused an error. Resolved collaboratively via screen share to adjust Salesforce Connected App settings.
comment_summary: Waqar encountered an error after updating the key and reverted. Ryan offered to troubleshoot via web share. Issue was eventually resolved.
